title: Assistant Operation Manager
description:
Company Overview

ABS is one of the leading suppliers of Ironmongery, Signage and Flooring products. Nowadays, with our headquarter located in Singapore, ABS has established branch offices in Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Shanghai, Macau as well as a sales representative in Jakarta and more.

ABS is a Building Construction Authority (BCA) registered sub-contractor. We are honoured to receive Singapore outstanding Enterprise Award and Bizsafe Certificate Level 3. Most of our products are tested to CE/ EN European Standard, SS332:2007 Singapore Standard, Green Label and Certificate of Fire-rated Ironmongery etc., respectively.

Job Responsibilities

· Handle set up of new companies e.g. in Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand, Hong Kong, Taiwan or China etc overseas Asian Markets

· Frequent travel to Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand, Hong Kong, Taiwan or China etc overseas Asian Markets

  • Whole group inventory control and intercompany inventory flow

· Monitor procurement, shipment and logistic management

Preferred Qualifications

§ Knowledge in company set-up, business license, suppliers and customers network, tax computation, custom duties, shipment Form E, suppliers, customers payment formalities, logistic and operation procedures etc in Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand, Hong Kong, Taiwan or China etc overseas Asian Markets.

§ Diploma / Degree in Accounting / Finance / Business Administration / Commerce / Logistic etc. subjects

§ Overseas working experience preferred

§ Exposure in operations of companies in overseas market

§ Demonstrated ability to handle sensitive information effectively and confidentially

§ With inventory control software knowledge e.g SAP / Microsoft Dynamics etc

§ Proven leadership capabilities in managing remote / overseas teams

§ Possess good business partnering skills with stakeholders across different levels

§ Possess excellent communication and interpersonal skills

§ Ability to thrive well in a complex and fast paced environment

§ Good command of multi-language

§ An applicant who has a strong affinity for accomplishing Company’s vision profoundly is essential.

§ Willing to work on Saturday

§ A team player and able to work independently.

www.absbuildingproduct.com enquiry@absbldg.com +65 92487647 / +852 90890992

postedCompany.description:
Since 1983, ABS Building Products PTE LTD has provided quality signage & building hardware products to the industry. We are the sole distributor of door hardware, such as Assa, Brio, Formani, Minusco, and DanSign / Modulex signage system etc which carry vast range of products .

We not only supply but also provide design specification works for both the contractors and designers market. Our Site supervisors are always available to ensure smooth completion of the projects undertaken.

Our sign system is easy to change but tamper to proof. There is no limit to the size of our sign as it can be extended or shortened by the addition or removal of profiles. At every stage, the signs remain visual complete and securely fastened. In addition to the range of profiles, colors and typefaces provides you with utmost versatility.

ABS’s passion for quality, simplicity and flexibility, reflects in the products. Products are designed skillfully and are made of superior quality materials providing solidity, durability, and above all, trust. The company’s overwhelming emphasis throughout ensures that each ABS product that reaches the user is not only beautiful in looks, but also extremely sturdy.

It is ABS’s endeavour to help you have the best design solutions. You visualize-choose the form, the function and the finish. Right from Revolving a door or window, to ControLling it, and from Operating, to Securing hardware there’s no chance of anything being overlooked. Rest assured you have the best combination of elegance, style, effectiveness and efficiency, with regard to all your architectural hardware and signage needs with ABS.

For more details, please visit www.absbuildingproduct.com/
postedCompany.name: ABS BUILDING PRODUCTS PTE. LTD.
